description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- refactor: delete frontend dead stores, extract shared types by @Carme99 in #91
- fix(v2.7.2): verifier-flagged nits + release-hygiene catch by @Carme99 in #92
- chore(v2.7.2): a11y fix + project-wide rustfmt pass by @Carme99 in #93
- feat(ci): add Linux (.deb + .AppImage) to release matrix by @Carme99 in #94
Full Changelog: v2.7.1...v2.7.2
